title: Wire Stage-A pre-route + MultiRuntimePool into the live gateway inbound path (PRIMARY)

tests.summary: 6 passed. gateway-routing.test.ts (3): drives the REAL RoutedGateway (createRoutedGateway → MultiRuntimePool + routing-core + stage-b + telemetry) with a deterministic FakeSession — classify→resolve→LOG at resolution→pool serves→honored token (live-route-ok); honored:false on a mismatched token; a second prompt resolving to a different {model,effort} slash-injects /model haiku + /effort low onto the live operative and updates currentTarget (live-switch-ok). gateway-live-route.integration.test.ts (3): boots the ACTUAL gateway-pty.mjs child process with the documented runtime stub (GARRISON_GATEWAY_RUNTIME_STUB) and POSTs a REAL prompt THROUGH the gateway HTTP /chat — asserts reply token cc-sonnet-med, decisions.jsonl entry at resolution time, honored=true; a trivial prompt lands on cc-haiku-low.

liveProbe.summary: LIVE with a real claude TUI session (no stub): live-route-ok + live-switch-ok. t1.route=cc-sonnet-med honored=true; t2 trivial prompt → cc-haiku-low honored=true via in-place /model+/effort slash-inject; decisions.jsonl=2 entries written at resolution time. The asserted-not-lived gap from BRIEF v4 is now LIVED.

e2e.summary: HTTP child-process integration test IS the end-to-end driver (real gateway process, real HTTP).

notes: gateway-routing.mjs (new) is the routing layer: resolveModelRouterDir (repo-seed OR installed apm_modules) + loadRoutingCore (dynamic-import the three pure cores) + loadRoutingConfig (composition routing.json else seed) + RoutedGateway (start→checkout operative+classifier from a MultiRuntimePool; preRoute = classify via the warm classifier→resolveRoute→appendDecision at resolution time→applySwitch via planSwitch slash-inject/respawn; postTurn = checkHonored + honored:false telemetry; ensureOperative/ensureClassifier re-checkout dead sessions). gateway-pty.mjs wires it: initRouting() builds the routing pool when the model-router fitting is resolvable (ROUTING_ENABLED, disable with GARRISON_ROUTING=0), falls back to the legacy single-session spawn otherwise; runRoutedTurn prepends the [gateway-route:] annotation, streams via extractReply, posts the honored check. Documented test seam GARRISON_GATEWAY_RUNTIME_STUB swaps the leaf session factory for the free/deterministic HTTP integration test. Satisfies U1 tokens live-route-ok, live-switch-ok.
